title: Rion (disambiguation)
content:
'''Rion''' can refer to several things:

*'''[[Rion (individual)|Rion]]''', a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] and leader of a [[Corellian Resistance/Legends|Rebel cell]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
*'''[[Rion/Legends|Rion]]''', a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].
*'''[[Rion (city)|Rion]]''', the capital city of [[Junction V]].

{{Disambig}}
